name: Riot Control and Internal Security Unit
description: Paramilitary police formation equipped with non-lethal and lethal riot suppression gear. Deployed to maintain public order, disperse protests, and enforce state of emergency declarations.

specialAbilities.name: Crowd Suppression
specialAbilities.description: Tear gas, water cannons, and rubber bullets reduce civil unrest levels but may inflame public opinion if overused.

specialAbilities.name: Curfew Enforcement
specialAbilities.description: Enables state curfew orders, restricting population movement and reducing protest organization effectiveness.
